title: Suki Gifts 12149 Labradoodle Dog Lying Down Multi-Coloured
features: Suki Gifts International - 30cm Lying Plush Toy, Labradoodle (12149)
Soft caress plush toy with airbrushed details
Part of the yomiko classics lifelike animals collections
description: From the manufacturer About Us We are an innovative British soft toy & giftware manufacturer which specialises in gifts for everyone both in the UK & internationally. Based in the UK with a friendly field sales team, all of our products are designed in-house by our Product Development Team. Our ever expanding range includes collectible Silver Tag Bears, a variety of plush characters, baby giftware, celebratory drinkware, key rings & many more giftware items. Each year we also launch Christmas collection including personalised ornaments.
